title: Green Blade BB-TT204 15m x 3mm Trimmer Line
features: Ideal for use with heavy duty petrol trimmers
Made from tough and flexible nylon
Easy to fit in dispense pack
Replacement trimmer line to fit most models of garden trimmers
description: Product Description Green Blade trimmer line is manufactured from tough, flexible nylon and is easy to fit to most brands of grass trimmer. It comes packed in an easy dispense pack and is 3mm thick. It is ideal for use with heavy duty petrol trimmers. Line measures 15m length by 3mm thick. Green Blade offers a comprehensive range of garden tools and general garden maintenance products. Highly visible branded packaging. 12 month no quibble guarantee. If you’re a novice gardener or just keen to upgrade your outdated tools, Greenblade can help. Bringing together a huge choice of equipment, so that you will find all you need, from a hardwearing pair of Gloves to a Ratchet Tree Pruner or even a Garden Cart. Greenblade provide top quality garden tools that will take the strain out of even the hardest of tasks. Box Contains 1 x Piece
